tagline: Quality and Caring Pool Service Since 1991

hero.headline: 35 Years of Pools Done Right by Family
hero.subheadline: Chester County families have trusted Great Valley Pool Service since 1991. Our 25-truck fleet and award-winning team handle your pool, awnings, and holiday lights so you can stop worrying and start enjoying your backyard.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Pool Care, Awnings & Holiday Lights<br class="hidden md:block"> All From One Trusted Team
services.subtitle: From weekly chemical balancing to holiday light installation, we keep your home looking its best every season. One call covers it all.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Chemical balancing, skimming, vacuuming, and equipment checks by trained technicians. Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready every single week.

cards.title: Pool Opening & Closing
cards.description: Professional seasonal opening and winterization for 1,500+ pools annually. We prepare your pool for summer fun and protect it through harsh PA winters.

cards.title: Equipment Sales & Installation
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, salt systems, and custom covers from all major brands. Expert installation and reliable repairs, most completed same-visit.

cards.title: Awning Sales & Installation
cards.description: Retractable, stationary, and window awnings to transform your outdoor living space with shade and style. Professional measuring and installation included.

cards.title: Holiday Lights & Decor
cards.description: Commercial-grade holiday lights and greenery professionally installed and removed. Hassle-free festive decorating that makes your home the envy of the block.

cards.title: Retail Store & Online Shop
cards.description: Visit our Route 30 store in Frazer for pool and spa chemicals, supplies, accessories, and toys. Plus an online store with nationwide shipping.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Worry-Free Pool Care

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Consultation
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and what you need. We provide an honest, no-pressure assessment within 24 hours. No contracts, no obligations.

steps.title: Our Award-Winning Team Gets to Work
steps.description: One of our 25+ fully equipped service trucks arrives on schedule. Chemical balancing, cleaning, equipment checks — handled with 35 years of expertise.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Backyard Oasis
steps.description: Your pool stays sparkling, your awning provides cool shade, and your holiday lights dazzle the neighbors. Sit back — Great Valley has you covered year-round.

about.label: Why Chester County Trusts Us
about.headline: Family-Owned Since 1991 — Your Neighbors, Not a Franchise
about.description: Started in a garage by Alfred and Karen Richards in 1991, Great Valley Pool Service has grown into Chester County's most trusted pool care team. Now led by Tracy and Cecil Bond, our 25-truck operation serves over 400 weekly customers and handles 1,500+ seasonal jobs each year. We have earned national recognition from PSN, Jandy, and AQUA Magazine — but what matters most is that we still treat every customer like family.

features.title: National Award-Winning Service
features.description: Ranked in the PSN & Jandy Top 50 nationally three years running, plus AQUA 100 and Best of Chester County honors.

features.title: Free Pool Education Sessions
features.description: We host free pool care workshops twice a year because informed pool owners are happy pool owners. Come learn, ask questions, and meet the team.

features.title: Year-Round Service & Employment
features.description: Pool care in summer, awnings in spring, holiday lights in winter. Our team works year-round, so you get experienced technicians every season.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service level that fits your pool and budget. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime — we earn your trust every visit.

guarantee.headline: Our "Family Promise" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us and we will come back and make it right at no extra charge. We have been building trust in Chester County for 35 years because we stand behind every job. Your satisfaction is not just a policy — it is our family reputation on the line.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start weekly service?
faqs.answer: Most new customers are scheduled within 3-5 business days. We serve Chester County, the Main Line, and surrounding areas with a fleet of 25+ trucks, so we can usually accommodate your preferred day quickly.

faqs.question: Do you require long-term contracts?
faqs.answer: No contracts required. We believe in earning your business every single visit. You can adjust or cancel your service anytime with no fees and no hassle.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Chester County and the Main Line including Frazer, Malvern, Paoli, Exton, West Chester, Devon, Berwyn, and surrounding Delaware Valley communities in Pennsylvania.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service visits?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most customers provide gate access and we handle everything while you are away. You will receive a service summary after each visit so you always know what was done.

faqs.question: Do you only do pool service?
faqs.answer: We offer three services under one roof: pool care, awning sales and installation, and professional holiday lights and decor. This means you get a trusted team for your home year-round.

testimonials.name: Long-time Customer
testimonials.text: I have been using Great Valley Pools for 16 years and have always had impeccable service. They quickly adjust to customer preferences and provide repairs in a timely manner.

testimonials.name: Krissy T.
testimonials.text: A great company! I found this company to be wonderful. They provided courteous service and a knowledgeable staff. I would absolutely recommend them.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Homeowner
testimonials.text: Very professional company with everything done on schedule and high quality. I would recommend them highly to anyone looking for pool service.

contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure quote from Chester County's most trusted pool service. 35 years of family-owned expertise, one phone call away.
benefits: Free pool inspection with every quote
